channel.title: NAS on Dojocube
channel.description: Recent content in NAS on Dojocube

item.title: NAS Server
item.description: Your own personal NAS server using OpenMediaVault on Raspberry Pi OpenMediaVault on Pi (Total Setup Time: 90 mins) With my old Raspberry Pi 3 Mobel B V1.2 laying around, I plan to re-purpose it into a NAS server. OpenMediaVault (OMV) is a network attached storage (NAS) solution based on Debian Linux. So, let’s start trying openmediavault on Raspberry Pi out. This tutorial lists my steps for setting OMV, referencing from Installing OMV5 On a Raspberry Pi.
